Krunic has finally taken Milan. The Bosnian player played a great match against Verona on Sunday, marking a free kick. Krunic started differently this year, offering excellent performances in the Europa League.

The former Empoli player could be sold to Germany in September. Friburgo in fact had almost closed his transfer but Milan blocked everything. The Germans had offered around 8 million for him. His former coach Marco Giampaolo also wanted him with him at Turin but Milan refused to sell him. The Rossoneri’s choice was right. Krunic did not have a good start at Milan.

He played little, especially for mental problems. the midfielder after the match against Verona admitted that he had not had a quiet period. But now everything is behind him: Krunic has recovered and is ready to help Milan.

- Gabriel Jesus - the transfer of the Brazilian would be possible in the event of promotion to the Champions League and if Erling Haaland joins Manchester City.
